globalwatchlist-desc: Ku dar liiska la socodka caalamiga ah
globalwatchlist-summary: Bog gaar ah oo lagu eego liiska la socodka caalamiga ah
globalwatchlistsettings: Dejimaha liiska la socodka caalamiga ah
globalwatchlistsettings-summary: Bog gaar ah oo lagu maamulo liiska la socodka caalamiga ah
globalwatchlist-api-error: Khalad API ayaa dhacay markii lala falgalayay "$1":
globalwatchlist-editwatchlist: Wax ka beddel liiska la socodka
globalwatchlist-emptyfeed: Goobaha aan wax isbeddel ah ku dhicin
globalwatchlist-fetch-site-failure: Waa lagu guul-darraystay in la soo qaado isbeddellada
globalwatchlist-filter-anon: Wax ka beddelada aan la aqoon
globalwatchlist-filter-not-anon: Kaliya wax ka beddelka ay sameeyeen isticmaalayaasha soo galay
globalwatchlist-filter-not-bot: Kaliya wax ka beddelka aan bot-ka ahayn
globalwatchlist-filter-not-minor: Kaliya wax ka beddelka aan yarayn
globalwatchlist-filter-only-anon: Kaliya wax ka beddelka si qarsoodi ah loo sameeyay
globalwatchlist-getoptions-error: Khalad ayaa la ogaaday markii la soo qaadayay xulashooyinka isticmaalaha ee kaydsan. Waxaa la isticmaali doonaa xulashooyinka caadiga ah halkii.
globalwatchlist-globalwatchlistbacklink: Ku laabo Liiska la socodka caalamiga ah
globalwatchlist-gotoglobal-tooltip: Eeg liiska la socodka caalamiga ah
globalwatchlist-grouped-timestamp: Waqtiga isbeddelkii ugu dambeeyay ayaa la muujinayaa isbeddellada la kooxeeyay
globalwatchlist-javascript-required: Boggan gaarka ah wuxuu u baahan yahay JavaScript si uu u shaqeeyo
globalwatchlist-markseen-all: Dhammaan goobaha u calaamadee kuwo la arkay
globalwatchlist-markseen-allconfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad dhammaan goobaha u calaamadeyso kuwo la arkay?
globalwatchlist-must-login: Fadlan soo gal si aad u isticmaasho bogagga gaarka ah ee Liiska La-socodka Caalamiga ah
globalwatchlist-must-login-for-temp-user: Fadlan samee koonto si aad u isticmaasho bogagga gaarka ah ee Liiska La-socodka Caalamiga ah
globalwatchlist-notify-savingfailed: Waa lagu guul darraystay in la keydiyo dejimaha. Fadlan mar kale isku day
globalwatchlist-notify-settingssaved: Dejimahaaga waa la keydiyay. [[Special:GlobalWatchlist|Ku noqo liiska la-socodka guud]].
globalwatchlist-option-confirmallsites: U baahan xaqiijin ka hor inta aan dhammaan goobaha loo calaamadin kuwo la arkay
globalwatchlist-option-fastmode: Si degdeg ah u soo rari, laakiin faahfaahinta way yaraanaysaa
globalwatchlist-option-grouppage: U kala kooxee natiijooyinka bog ahaan
globalwatchlist-prefs-settings: Si aad u dejiso xulashooyinka liiska la socodka caalamiga ah, fadlan booqo [[Special:GlobalWatchlistSettings]].
globalwatchlist-resetchanges: Dib u celi isbeddellada la sameeyay
globalwatchlist-rewatch: dib ugu dar liiska la socodka
globalwatchlist-settings-error-anon-bot: Isticmaalayaasha aan soo gelin ma sameyn karaan wax ka beddel bot ah
globalwatchlist-settings-error-anon-mino: Isticmaalayaasha aan soo gelin ma sameyn karaan wax ka beddel yar
globalwatchlist-settings-error-duplicate: Goobta "$1" waxaa lagu daray dhowr jeer.
globalwatchlist-settings-error-invalid-s: Goobta "$1" ma aha wiki ku xiran koontadaada CentralAuth.
globalwatchlist-settings-error-no-types: Nooc wax ka beddel ah lama dooran
globalwatchlist-settings-error-too-many-: {{PLURAL:$1|$1 goob ayaa la doortay|$1 goobood ayaa la doortay}}, taasoo ka badan $2, oo ah tirada ugu badan ee la oggol yahay.
globalwatchlist-sitelist: Liiska goobaha ee uu isticmaale qeexay
globalwatchlist-tour-addsite-description: Guji kor si aad ugu darto saf kale oo goob ah.
globalwatchlist-tour-fastmode-descriptio: Hab degdeg ah wuxuu keenaa soo bandhigid degdeg ah, laakiin wuxuu yareeyaa faahfaahinta. Calaamadaha Wikibase lama soo qaado, waxaana la muujinayaa liis fudud oo bogag leh isbeddello, iyada oo aan la muujin faahfaahinta tifaftirayaasha ama isbeddellada laftooda
globalwatchlist-tour-filters-description: Liiska la socodka caalamiga ah ma laha dhammaan xulashooyinka shaandhaynta ee laga heli karo liiska la socodka caadiga ah. Shaandhaynta la heli karo waa wax ka beddelka isticmaalayaasha aan soo galin iyo kuwa soo galay, iyo sidoo kale shaandhayn ku saabsan wax ka beddelka lagu calaamadeeyay kuwa yar ama kuwa bot-ka ah.
globalwatchlist-tour-help-description: Dukumeenti dheeraad ah ayaa laga heli karaa mediawiki.org
globalwatchlist-tour-intro-description: Kordhinta GlobalWatchlist waxay ku dartaa bog gaar ah, [[Special:GlobalWatchlist]], si loo arko liisas la socod oo badan hal mar. Boggan waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu dejiyo dookhyada isticmaalaha ee liiska la socodka caalamiga ah.
globalwatchlist-tour-sitelist-descriptio: Tani waa liiska goobaha lagu dari doono liiska la socodka caalamiga ah. Isticmaal URL-ka aasaasiga ah ee goobta, tusaale ahaan so.wikipedia.org.
globalwatchlist-tour-types-description: Isticmaalayaashu waxay xakamayn karaan noocyada isbeddellada la muujinayo.
